description.title: Product Description
description.text: The IBC-1680W is a handheld wireless 2D barcode scanner built for retail, warehouse, and industrial data capture. Its 640x480 CMOS imager reads all common 1D and 2D barcodes - including QR, DataMatrix, PDF417, and mobile payment codes on phone screens. With a 100m open-field wireless range, a 2500mAh battery, and a 1.5m drop rating, it keeps scanning through long shifts. We support full OEM customization including logo, housing color, firmware, and packaging.

features.title: Key Features
items: Reads 1D & 2D barcodes plus mobile screen / payment codes
2.4G wireless with optional Bluetooth, up to 100m range
640 x 480 imager with 20% minimum print contrast
2500mAh battery with offline storage of 20,000 barcodes
1.5m drop resistance and 100,000 Lux ambient light immunity

oemSupport.title: OEM Support
items: Firmware, beep tones, and data-format editing
Packaging design, inserts, and multi-language manuals

items.title: Request a Quote
items.description: Tell us your target market, application, and order quantity. We aim to respond within 24 hours.

items.title: Request Samples
items.description: Verify read performance and durability before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
